overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV featuring Niko Bellic walking through an urban neighborhood on a sunny day. The character crosses streets, passes pedestrians and vehicles including a police car, and walks along tree-lined sidewalks with mixed residential and commercial buildings.

events.description: character steps off curb and begins crossing the street
reaches the opposite sidewalk after crossing

agents.ego_description: waiting at corner then walking across the intersection crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection
woman standing at corner holding shopping bags

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with green window frames at the intersection
paved road with white striped crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a city corner waiting for traffic, then crosses the asphalt street. A black sports car passes through the intersection while a pedestrian waits on the opposite corner. The scene is set in a sunny urban environment with a large brownstone building visible across the street.

events.description: character briefly runs then returns to walking pace
yellow taxi cab drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: woman in white shirt walking toward the camera
yellow taxi driving along the street

entered.detail: tall brick building with fire escapes running along the right side of the sidewalk
concrete and wood bench on the sidewalk near the curb
mature deciduous tree with green canopy casting shadows on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a tree-lined sidewalk next to a red brick building, the character passes benches and parking meters. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction while vehicles including a yellow taxi pass on the street. The environment features mature trees casting dappled shadows on the concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection corner with police presence and food vendor

character begins crossing the street after police car passes
reaches opposite corner with food cart and new storefronts

entered.detail: white police SUV with blue stripes stopped at the traffic light
distinctive building with brown timber framing and steep roof at the intersection
food cart with umbrella featuring hot dog graphics and 'Nutty But Nice' branding

segments.scene_description: At the next intersection, the character waits as a police SUV passes before crossing the street. The scene features a distinctive Tudor-style corner building and a 'Nutty But Nice' food cart on the opposite sidewalk. The character crosses the crosswalk and approaches the food cart area where pedestrians are gathered.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with closed storefronts and transit shelter

events.description: character walks past bus stop shelter partially blocking view
approaching large commercial building with billboard advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking past shuttered stores and a bus stop with graffiti-covered advertisements

entered.detail: row of closed shops with metal shutters and green trim

store with red awning labeled 'FURNITURE' across the street
large multi-story commercial building with prominent red billboard on facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk past closed storefronts with metal shutters, the character passes a graffiti-covered bus stop shelter. The street features parked cars and a furniture store across the road. The character continues toward a large building with prominent billboard advertisements at the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban neighborhood that shifts from residential brownstones to a more commercial district. It begins at a city corner where the character crosses an asphalt street past a black sports car and a large brownstone building. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions to a tree-lined sidewalk beside a red brick building, where dappled shadows fall across the pavement as yellow taxis pass by. The camera then follows the character through another intersection, passing a police SUV and a Tudor-style building before approaching a Nutty But Nice food cart. Finally, the environment opens into a commercial stretch featuring closed storefronts with metal shutters and a graffiti-covered bus stop, moving toward a large building adorned with prominent billboard advertisements.
